states.name: Pinocchio
states.title: Automaton of Memories
states.description:
Pinocchio's earliest memory was the sight of many adults surrounding her.
"You have a special talent. Use it for the sake of our nation."
That is all they told her. Pinocchio couldn't go against those words. She had no choice but to obey.

states.name: Pinocchio
states.title: Automaton of Memories
states.description:
"Where are my mama and papa?"
But no one would answer. Forced to delve into the memories of others over and over, Pinocchio's heart was gradually overwritten. Even so, she continued to believe that her parents were surely somewhere in her sealed memories.

states.name: Pinocchio
states.title: Automaton of Memories
states.description:
Report by Jiren
"We have implanted a sealed memory deep in the psyche of the target automaton. This memory is empty, with no actual substance. This measure was taken to make the doll believe it has lost memories, thereby preventing an ego collapse and loss of control."
